text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After many busy days of attending workshops and
meetings, I finally have a moment to rest, when...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What is the meaning of this? Your workspace is
covered in dust, trash, and loose documents—it's
filthy!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I meant to return to work after delivering these handouts to you, but I can't leave this office like... this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
A cluttered room is a reflection of a cluttered
mind. Now, up on your feet. I'll help, but we're
taking care of this immediately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm suddenly subjected to a one-on-one crash
course on cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Open the windows and go get a trash bag ready!
We'll start by clearing your desk!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Throw away everything you don't need! Gather up
all the trinkets you have lying about... Hey, don't
just throw those loose paperclips in the drawer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cleaning session proceeds quickly, thanks to
her strict, yet precise instructions.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I think we've finished for the most part. All that's left is to dispose of the trash and sort these documents.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've come this far, I might as well see
this through to the end. We'll split the final two
tasks. Which do you prefer I handle?
choice_data_list: Could you take care of the trash?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Perhaps I should warm up before
tackling this mountain of rubbish...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Urk! This is... nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, my office is spick-and-span.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. It's only natural for fellow employees
to assist each other. Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I foresee a great deal of muscle pain for me
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
While file organization is my forte, this huge pile
is rather daunting. But very well.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Save, toss, unclear, toss, save, unclear... I knew
what to expect going into this, but the sheer
volume complicates things.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize this task would take so long.
Perhaps it's time we consider moving away from
using printouts to share information.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I should report my findings to URA's upper
management.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I receive a survey about whether
the academy should begin using paperless
methods to distribute information.
